requests.video_model_prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Burberry Long Silk Cotton Foxfield Trench Coat. The scene shows a minimal studio with warm beige cyclorama and matte. Use adult woman with poised editorial presence as the only moving person or hand. A simple matte black. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. A locked-off, medium-wide shot in a warm beige studio shows a simple matte black garment rack centered on a matte floor. Hanging from a plain light-wood hanger is a long oatmeal beige trench coat (the real Burberry Foxfield trench), its clean lapels and belt visible, softly lit so the silk‑cotton faille looks smooth and refined. After a brief beat, an adult woman wearing a black turtleneck and black tailored trousers steps in from frame right. She calmly lifts the trench from the hanger, brings it slightly closer to her, and slips her arms into the sleeves in one smooth motion without fussing with buttons. She settles the collar with a light touch, then takes a small in-place quarter turn toward her left, presenting the front. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.
requests.planner_visual_prompt: A locked-off, medium-wide shot in a warm beige studio shows a simple matte black garment rack centered on a matte floor. Hanging from a plain light-wood hanger is a long oatmeal beige trench coat (the real Burberry Foxfield trench), its clean lapels and belt visible, softly lit so the silk‑cotton faille looks smooth and refined. After a brief beat, an adult woman wearing a black turtleneck and black tailored trousers steps in from frame right. She calmly lifts the trench from the hanger, brings it slightly closer to her, and slips her arms into the sleeves in one smooth motion without fussing with buttons. She settles the collar with a light touch, then takes a small in-place quarter turn toward her left, presenting the front and side so the long, refined silhouette is clear against the black base outfit. She holds a composed pose for a moment, letting the drape read cleanly under the soft warm light, with the empty rack remaining behind her. The camera never moves, and the action stays slow and elegant.
requests.audio_direction: Soft, elegant piano underscore; natural cloth rustle as the coat is lifted and settled; no voiceover.
